items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Export for compliance audits' feature, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an export feature, yet there are no concrete examples or evidence of this feature being implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive validation.
